question: What is the price of FlowDesk's Free plan?
answer: The Free plan is $0/month and supports up to 3 users with access to task boards and basic team chat.

question: How much does the Pro plan cost?
answer: The Pro plan costs $8 per user per month, billed monthly or annually, and unlocks unlimited users, time tracking, and integrations.

question: Does FlowDesk offer Enterprise pricing?
answer: Yes, Enterprise pricing is custom and based on team size, support needs, and security requirements. Contact sales for a quote.

question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
answer: Yes, annual billing on the Pro plan gives you 2 months free compared to paying monthly.

question: Can I switch plans at any time?
answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime from Account Settings > Billing. Changes take effect immediately.

question: Do you offer student or nonprofit discounts?
answer: Yes, students and registered nonprofits get 50% off the Pro plan. Apply through the Discounts page with valid documentation.

question: What is a task board in FlowDesk?
answer: A task board is a Kanban-style view where tasks move across columns like To Do, In Progress, and Done, helping teams visualize workflow.

question: Can I track time spent on tasks?
answer: Yes, time tracking is built into every task. Click the timer icon on any task to start or stop tracking, available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: Does FlowDesk support team chat?
answer: Yes, every task has a comment thread, and each project has a dedicated team chat channel for discussions outside specific tasks.

question: Can I create custom workflows?
answer: Yes, you can add, rename, or reorder board columns to match your team's workflow, available on all plans.

question: Does FlowDesk have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, FlowDesk is available on iOS and Android with full task management, chat, and notification support.

question: Can I assign tasks to multiple people?
answer: Yes, tasks support multiple assignees along with a single task owner responsible for completion.

question: Is there a calendar view for tasks?
answer: Yes, switch from board view to calendar view to see tasks plotted by due date.

question: How do I create a FlowDesk account?
answer: Sign up at flowdesk.io/signup using your email or Google account, then verify your email to activate the workspace.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Go to Workspace Settings > Members > Invite, then enter email addresses. Invitees receive a link to join your workspace.

question: How do I update my payment method?
answer: Navigate to Account Settings > Billing > Payment Method, then add or update your card details.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your plan remains active until the end of the current billing cycle.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase for annual plans. Contact billing support to request one.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Danger Zone > Delete Account. This permanently removes all your data after a 30-day grace period.

question: I forgot my password, how do I reset it?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the reset link sent to your registered email.

question: Does FlowDesk integrate with Slack?
answer: Yes, connect Slack from Workspace Settings > Integrations to get task notifications directly in your Slack channels.

question: Can I sync FlowDesk with Google Calendar?
answer: Yes, enable Google Calendar sync from Integrations settings to see task due dates automatically on your calendar.

question: Does FlowDesk have an API?
answer: Yes, FlowDesk offers a REST API on Pro and Enterprise plans for custom integrations. API keys are generated in Developer Settings.

question: Can I connect FlowDesk to GitHub?
answer: Yes, the GitHub integration links commits and pull requests to tasks automatically when you mention a task ID in your commit message.

question: Why is my task board not loading?
answer: This is usually a temporary sync issue. Refresh the page; if the problem persists, clear your browser cache or check FlowDesk's status page.

question: Why am I not receiving email notifications?
answer: Check Account Settings > Notifications to confirm email alerts are enabled, and verify the emails aren't in your spam folder.

question: Why can't I invite a new team member?
answer: This usually happens when your workspace has hit its user limit on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited members.

question: The Slack integration stopped working, what do I do?
answer: Disconnect and reconnect the Slack integration from Workspace Settings > Integrations. This refreshes the authorization token.
